attributes.name: Cold Ones
attributes.summary:
Join for extended and uncensored videos, the exclusive Sober Podcast, bonus gaming content, behind-the-scenes chaos and all the extra shenanigans from Max, Chad and the entire Cold Ones crew!

Your support helps us create more content, pay our crew, and of course, buy more grog.

attributes.full_name: RXmedia news team xx albanian nonce killa 12
attributes.last_name: news team xx albanian nonce killa 12

attributes.description:
Extended Cuts - Full access to extended cut versions of our YouTube videos and podcasts.

Exclusive Community Access - Join our private Patreon only Discord. (Make sure to link your Patreon account in your Discord settings to gain access!)

Weekly Content – Get access to exclusive weekly drops, including our Sober Podcast and gaming videos, available only for Patreon members.

Giveaways - We occasionally give away unique items from past videos, like art pieces and one of a kind trinkets. (Be sure to add your postal information to your Patreon account-only patrons with postage details added are eligible to win.)
attributes.title: 🍺 Buy us a Drink 🥃
